# Copilot instructions

- Use **AKS AVM (Azure Verified Modules)** for all Azure Kubernetes Service deployments in this repository.
- For Azure Storage Accounts, always use **managed identity-based authentication** and **never** use key-based or shared-key authentication.
- Keep implementations aligned with the **Azure Well-Architected Framework** and evaluate decisions against its guidance: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/well-architected/what-is-well-architected-framework
